name: Sarah Chen
bio: Roommates for three years at UC Davis. She's the one who got me into rock climbing, and we still try to hit a new gym together whenever she's in town.

name: Marcus Johnson
bio: Grew up two houses down from me. We rode the same school bus for ten years and still text every time our old street comes up in conversation.

name: Priya Patel
bio: My first manager at Adobe and the reason I learned to actually negotiate my salary. We grab coffee whenever she's not buried in product launches.

name: David Kim
bio: We spot each other on leg day at Equinox three mornings a week. Outside the gym he's basically convinced me to try every new ramen spot downtown.

name: Emily Rodriguez
bio: We've been in the same book club since 2022 and somehow end up arguing about the ending of every single novel. She's the friend I call first with big news.

name: James Whitfield
bio: My cousin on my dad's side, two years older than me. He taught me to drive stick shift in a parking lot in high school and never lets me forget it.

name: Aisha Mohammed
bio: Backpacked through Vietnam and Thailand together senior year of college. She's currently based in Lisbon and we keep promising each other a reunion trip.

name: Tom Nguyen
bio: Sits two desks over at work and somehow always knows the best lunch spot within walking distance. We carpool on Fridays and debrief the whole week.
